step_rationale: Stable metabolite of thromboxane A2; aspirin-sensitive platelet amplification.
mechanism: Thromboxane B2 is the stable inactive metabolite of thromboxane A2, a COX-1-generated eicosanoid that amplifies platelet recruitment and aggregation.
